creator: mohacsi@ik.bme.hu
text:
The /stand/sysinstall should check existence of selected desktop package
before trying to add certain package. It asks for installation media for every
change of desktop even if the packages already installed. This behaviour is a 
bit annoying.

Fix: 

Possible solution:
	package_add function should check existence of a the package, and give
the user an oportunity to reinstall?, use current, cancel.

De we need reinstall?
How-To-Repeat: 
Select an already installed desktop, and sysinstall will prompt for install
media.
